creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
Ooops.. I forgot to bump the portrevision:

--- /usr/ports/audio/lopster/Makefile   Sat Nov 11 00:57:28 2000
+++ lopster/Makefile    Mon Nov 13 22:24:08 2000
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=      lopster
 PORTVERSION=   0.9.6
+PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    audio
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}

--Roman Shterenzon, UNIX System Administrator and Consultant
[ Xpert UNIX Systems Ltd., Herzlia, Israel. Tel: +972-9-9522361 ]
